b'=== Test 1: Variable Shadowing Across Functions ==='
b'func_a x:' 10
b'func_b x:' 20
b'func_c x:' 30
b'func_c y:' 60
b'Results:' 10 20 60

b'=== Test 2: Parameter Shadowing ==='
b'process_a value:' 5
b'process_b value:' 5
b'Process results:' 105 205

b'=== Test 3: Local Variable Shadowing ==='
b'calculate_a temp:' 5
b'calculate_a result:' 10
b'calculate_b temp:' 10
b'calculate_b result:' 30
b'Calculate results:' 10 30

b'=== Test 4: Variable Reassignment ==='
b'z initially:' 1
b'z after first reassign:' 2
b'z after second reassign:' 3
